ItacAcademyItem.Name: Vigilanti - Murano (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Crane holding a stone in its raised foot to keep itself awake
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Publications related to the Academy, but not in British Library collections, include: Tommaso Buoni, Intertenimento illustre del senso & della ragione in forma di dialogo con gli suoi intermedij apparenti del r.d. Tomaso Buoni cittadino lucchese..... (In Venetia: appresso Marco Guarisco, 1604); Sommario degl`ordini che s`osservano nell`Accademia de` Vigilanti Purificati in Murano (Venezia, 1675); Maylender records also this title: Polyhymnia in Vigilantium purificatorum Lyceo D. Johannis Baptistae Eusebii Rhetorices prof. Alumnos excitat ad applausum dum Joannes Doglionum et Laurentius Stropparius.... (Venetiis Valvasensi, 1677).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
